claims: The repository contains a smaller-radius weakening theorem for UnguardedFOLocalityInputSurface.
The proved direction is s ≤ r, UnguardedFOLocalityInputSurface M φ r implies UnguardedFOLocalityInputSurface M φ s.
The proof uses assignment_gaifman_close_mono to forward a smaller-radius close hypothesis to the larger radius required by the existing invariant.
nonclaims: Does not prove larger-radius strengthening of locality input surfaces.
Does not prove reverse assignment-close monotonicity.
Does not prove max-radius conjunction closure.
Does not prove max-radius disjunction closure.
Does not prove existential quantifier handling.
Does not prove arbitrary formula-radius construction.
Does not prove Gaifman locality for unguarded first-order logic.
Does not prove general finite model theory closure.
